2605.29668.title: GRASP: Gated Regression-Aware Skill Proposer for Self-Improving LLM Agents
2605.29668.paper_summary: LLM agents acting in structured environments fail in operational rather than conversational ways, and reliability depends on procedural knowledge of the environment. Prior self-improvement methods accumulate natural-language guidance without checking that each new item preserves previously correct behavior, so a note that fixes one trajectory can silently regress another. We introduce GRASP (Gated Regression-Aware Skill Proposer), which treats agent improvement as a sequence of edits to a bounded skill library, admitting each candidate only if it produces a net improvement on a balanced held-out probe under a hard regression budget. We evaluate GRASP across five base models (gpt-oss-120b, DeepSeek V4 Flash, Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite, GPT-4.1, GPT-5.4) on two FHIR-based clinical benchmarks. On MedAgentBench, GRASP lifts gpt-oss-120b from 40.6% to 88.8%, exceeds the strongest of five self-improvement baselines by 21.0 points, and improves every other base model by 17.2 to 40.3 points. Ablations attribute the gain to comparative proposal generation, the acceptance gate, and the hard regression budget rather than to skill writing itself, which without validation is no better than using no skills. The mechanism generalizes beyond the clinical domain, improving agents on three of four non-clinical environments and remaining flat only where the action space is open-ended. Frozen libraries transfer across models, where skills from a stronger model improve weaker executors beyond what they learn for themselves while the reverse does not, an asymmetry that no ungated baseline reproduces.
2605.29668.paper_summary_zh: LLM 代理在結構化環境中運作時，失敗的原因是操作性而非對話性，可靠性取決於對環境的程序性知識。先前的自我改進方法累積自然語言指導，但未檢查每個新項目是否保持之前正確的行為，因此修正一個軌跡的註解可能會默默地使另一個軌跡退步。我們引入 GRASP（Gated Regression-Aware Skill Proposer），將代理的改進視為對有限技能庫的一系列編輯，僅在候選者在硬性回歸預算下對平衡的保留探針產生淨改善時才接受。我們在兩個基於 FHIR 的臨床基準上評估 GRASP，涵蓋五個基模型（gpt-oss-120b、DeepSeek V4 Flash、Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite、GPT-4.1、GPT-5.4）。在 MedAgentBench 上，GRASP 將 gpt-oss-120b 的表現從 40.6% 提升至 88.8%，超過五個自我改進基線中最強的模型 21.0 分，並使其他每個基模型提高 17.2 到 40.3 分。消融實驗將增益歸因於比較提案生成、接受閘和硬性回歸預算，而非技能編寫本身，因為在沒有驗證的情況下，這樣做並不比不使用技能更好。該機制在臨床領域之外也具有通用性，改善了四個非臨床環境中的三個代理，只有在行動空間無限制的情況下保持平穩。凍結的庫可以跨模型轉移，強模型的技能使弱執行者的表現超過他們自己學到的，而反之則不然，這種不對稱性是任何未經閘控的基線所無法重現的。
2605.29668.author: Johannes Moll et.al.
2605.29668.authors: Johannes Moll, Jean-Philippe Corbeil, Jiazhen Pan, Martin Hadamitzky, Daniel Rueckert, Lisa Adams, Keno Bressem
